chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1017 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on Misc. No.2919/2023 2. For orders on Misc. No.6442/2023 3. For orders on Misc. No.2443/2023 4. For hearing of main case 03.12.2025 None present. --------- This petition was presented before the Court on 10.11.2022 when none was present and the matter was adjourned. Since then, none has effected appearance. Same was position on 07.08.2023 when this matter was lastly fixed before the Court. It appears the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss it for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE Nadir*
